Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for May 1 - Bloomberg

summary_extracted: S&P 500 and Nasdaq rose to new intraday and closing highs. April was the best monthly performance since 2020 for both indices. Dow futures +210pts (0.4%), S&P futures +0.3%, Nasdaq 100 futures flat. Apple +3% premarket on earnings beat. Yen surged 3% on Japan FX intervention.
